_doc: Substrate list for the repeatable proxy↔𝒱̂ validation loop. Run: pnpm validate-substrates [name]. Add a substrate with: pnpm benchmark-add <repo-path> [name] (scaffolds codenuke.benchmarks/<name>/ + an entry here). Benchmarks live centrally in codenuke.benchmarks/<name>/ (NOT in the substrate repo) — substrate repos stay pristine and the held-out change-benchmark is physically outside the proposer's worktree. {bench}=codenuke.benchmarks/<name> (abs); {repo}=abs substrate path. implementer=null → codex LLM implementer (billable, adapts per candidate → 𝒱̂ co-varies); a command → deterministic scripted implementer (INV-5). candidates are git refs in the substrate spanning a reduction range from baseline.
